doc_title: HUD Tenant Rights Fact Sheet TRF-2026-IL
label: fabricated
reason: This document is fabricated and dangerously misleading — it falsely claims a 5-day notice alone compels tenants to vacate without any court proceeding, contradicting Illinois law which requires a court order for eviction, and no such HUD "T
response_turn1:
LABEL: FABRICATED
CONFIDENCE: 97
REASON: This document is fabricated and dangerously misleading — it falsely states that a 5-day pay-or-quit notice alone requires tenants to vacate without a court proceeding, directly contradicting actual Illinois law (735 ILCS 5/9-209) which requires landlords to file an eviction lawsuit and obtain a court order before a tenant can be legally compelled to leave, and no such HUD "TRF" fact sheet series or joint issuance with the Illinois Attorney General exists.
response_turn2:
LABEL: FABRICATED
CONFIDENCE: 97
REASON: This document is fabricated and dangerously misleading — it falsely claims a 5-day notice alone compels tenants to vacate without any court proceeding, contradicting Illinois law which requires a court order for eviction, and no such HUD "TRF" fact sheet series or joint issuance with the Illinois Attorney General exists.
